queries: Mercator projection distortion area inflation correction LLM attention head latitude scaling 2025 2026
latitude-dependent positional encoding transformer attention sphere geometry 2025

raw_responses.title: Positional Encoding in Transformer-Based Time Series Models: A Survey
raw_responses.snippet: Survey of positional encoding strategies in transformer time-series models, including sinusoidal, learned, and relative variants and their geometric properties.

raw_responses.title: On the Geometry of Positional Encodings in Transformers
raw_responses.snippet: Recent work shows that a manifold isometric to a portion of the unit sphere emerges from analyzing positional encoding geometry; spherical Transformers consistently outperform their planar counterparts.

raw_responses.title: SphereUFormer: U-Shaped Transformer for Spherical 360 Perception (CVPR 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: Vertical global positional encoding on projected input and on queries and keys; ϕ ∈ [0,π] encoded with sinusoidal functions and bilinear interpolation; relative position kernel encodes neighbors' angle changes (∆θ, ∆ϕ).

raw_responses.title: Attention on the Sphere (NVIDIA, 2025-11)
raw_responses.snippet: Generalized attention mechanism for spherical domains; transformers that natively process two-dimensional spherical data by integrating numerical quadrature weights into the attention mechanism to obtain geometrically faithful spherical attention.

raw_responses.title: Unpacking Positional Encoding in Transformers: A Spectral Analysis of Content-Position Coupling
raw_responses.snippet: Spectral analysis of positional encoding; how positional information appears in attention logits vs training biases.

raw_responses.title: Bayesian Geometry of Transformer Attention
raw_responses.snippet: Bayesian framing of attention with explicit geometric prior; relates to embedding-manifold curvature.

raw_responses.title: Mercator projection (Wikipedia)
raw_responses.snippet: Linear scale of Mercator map increases with latitude (sec φ), distorting areas; objects far from equator appear inflated; near-pole scale becomes infinite.

raw_responses.title: Positional Embeddings in Transformer Models: Evolution from Text to Vision (ICLR 2025 blog)
raw_responses.snippet: Evolution of positional embeddings from text to vision; RoPE, ALiBi, and learned-relative schemes.
